argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const url = '{{ url }}'; try { let attempts = 0; let likeBtn = null; let unlikeBtn = null; while (attempts < 20) { unlikeBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="unlike"]'); likeBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="like"]'); if (unlikeBtn || likeBtn) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); attempts++; } if (unlikeBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Tweet is already liked.' }; if (!likeBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find the Like button. Are you logged in?' }; likeBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const verifyBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="unlike"]'); if (verifyBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Tweet successfully liked.' }; return { ok: false, message: 'Like action was initiated but UI did not update.' }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }

variables.name: url
variables.help: The URL of the tweet to like
